name: Savory Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Cooked Beans (Adzuki Beans, Pinto Beans, Kidney Beans, Black Beans, or Anasazi Beans)
2 teaspoons Sea Salt or 2 tablespoons Tamari Soy Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer all ingredients until thick.
2. Garnish with plain yogurt.
To Cook Beans:
1. Rinse the beans.
2. Cook 2 cups of beans in 5 cups of water.
3. Bring to a boil, then add beans.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 to 3 hours until tender.
5. Do not season until the beans are done.
